stemHtml: Air-ground communication involves the transmission of information and meaning between pilots and air traffic controllers by means of verbal and non-verbal messages. Within this context, an aspect of non-verbal communication is…

options.a: paralanguage, that is, a person’s accent or volume of speech.
options.b: the sender’s physiological limitation, such as slurring of speech.
options.c: the recipient’s ability or willingness to listen attentively.
options.d: imposed by the limitations of the communication technology being used.
